infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mughith uses your location to dispatch you to nearby emergencies and share your live position with the operator.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Mughith shares your live location with dispatch while you respond to a case.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Mughith shares your live location with dispatch while you respond to a case.
